basics.name: Edimah SYNESIUS SONGO
basics.label: Applied Mathematician · Building Reliable AI Systems for Regulated Domains
basics.summary: Applied mathematician building reliable, mathematically grounded AI systems for regulated environments. Core toolkit: Bayesian and frequentist inference, optimisation for ML, kernel methods, deep learning, signal processing.

work.name: CRCDC Guadeloupe, Saint-Martin, Saint-Barthélémy
work.summary: Rebuilding the end-to-end data chain of a regulated public health cancer-screening organisation.
highlights: System audit, pipeline automation, and data governance on sensitive regulated health data
R-based statistical reporting for national regulating entities

work.name: Freelance
work.position: Independent Consultant — AI Reliability, Statistical Modelling & EU AI Act Readiness
work.summary: Statistical modelling and AI reliability consulting for regulated environments.
highlights: Public health data chain audit and automation, anomaly detection frameworks, model evaluation methodology
Building toward EU AI Act readiness assessments for healthcare and financial services clients

work.name: IFP Energies Nouvelles & ONERA
work.summary: Uncertainty and sensitivity analysis for coupled multiphysics systems (electrical motors, propulsion).
highlights: Variance-based sensitivity indices (Sobol) and kernel-based methods for high-dimensional input spaces
Exited to pursue a broader mathematical research agenda in AI systems and probabilistic ML

work.name: EDF R&D
work.summary: Bayesian calibration of physics models with uncertain inputs.
highlights: Bayesian calibration of physical models with noisy data using Python and OpenTURNS
MCMC sampling methods and exploration of unbiased parameter estimation via Markov-chain couplings

work.name: Avicenne Hospital
work.summary: Healthcare data analytics for patient management.
highlights: Development of interactive dashboards in R
